name: Disable-ExperimentalFeature

options.name: -Name
options.description: The name or names of the experimental features to disable.

options.name: -Scope
options.description: Determines which `powershell.config.json` to update whether it affects all users or just the current user.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.

args.name: -Name
args.description: The name or names of the experimental features to disable.

description: Disable an experimental feature on startup of new instance of PowerShell.
